seoTitle: Patrick vs Patrick Estate — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Patrick and Patrick Estate. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Patrick vs Patrick Estate: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Patrick and Patrick Estate.
heading: Patrick vs Patrick Estate — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Patrick, Queensland and Patrick Estate, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Patrick Estate has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Patrick (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Patrick or Patrick Estate safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Patrick has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Patrick Estate scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Patrick scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Patrick Estate scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Patrick or Patrick Estate?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Patrick Estate has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
